page_content:
CPSP239 Practicum: Internship (1-3 Credits)

Supervised internship in interest area related to the theme of the students’ College Park Scholars program.

Restriction: Must be in the College Park Scholars Program. Repeatable to: 3 credits.

CPSP249 Practicum: Service-Learning (1-3 Credits)

Supervised Service-Learning project in area related to the theme of the students’ College Park Scholars program.

Restriction: Must be in the College Park Scholars Program. Repeatable to: 3 credits.
